e2ee.peerMustBeOnline: The other user must be online to start E2EE Chat.
e2ee.enabled: Secure chat enabled. Messages are end-to-end encrypted so only you and the other person can read them.
e2ee.disabled: Secure chat disabled. New messages will be sent normally.
e2ee.endedOffline: Secure chat ended because the other user went offline.
e2ee.noSessionKey: Received a secure message, but no active secure session is available.
e2ee.decryptFailed: Failed to decrypt a secure message.

changelog.v11101_1: Added chat-header message search that reuses the animated sidebar search UI, now with avatar-based results and mobile-friendly search switching.
changelog.v11101_2: Expanded message search beyond the loaded timeline by querying older chat history on the server and fetching targeted message context when you open a result.
changelog.v11101_3: Optimized realtime behavior with more reliable reconnect loops, reduced chat-sync payloads through lazy history loading, and tighter mutual-chat privacy filtering for user and presence updates.
changelog.v11100_1: Added the bot platform with BotFather, bot tokens, the bot API, inline buttons, and bot start support.
changelog.v11100_2: Added unique handles for users and expanded public search so users, groups, channels, and bots can be found globally by handle.
changelog.v11100_3: Improved core chat behavior with Saved Messages, real contacts and contact aliases, plus the upgraded animated search experience in the sidebar.
changelog.v1152_1: The in-chat call panel is now more compact, and the screen stage only appears when someone is actively sharing.
changelog.v1152_2: Participant chips in active calls now stay inside a scrollable area so large calls do not overflow the layout.
changelog.v1152_3: Added localized incoming, outgoing, missed-call, and screen-sharing labels, and bumped the app to version 1.10.52.
changelog.v1151_1: File attachments and upload progress are now tied to the chat where you started them, so switching chats no longer shows the wrong preview or sends the upload into another conversation.
changelog.v1151_2: Voice-message recording now reliably turns the composer red in this client, and verified badges render their SVG icon correctly instead of collapsing into an empty placeholder.
changelog.v1151_3: The open private-chat header now refreshes verified badges when user data updates, and the client version, locale cache tag, and asset versions were bumped for immediate rollout.
changelog.v1150_1: Separated live voice calling into its own LiveKit-based call module instead of sending raw microphone audio over the main messenger socket.
changelog.v1150_2: Call invites, join and leave UI, and active call state now stay in the chat app while the actual voice transport runs through the dedicated call backend.
changelog.v1150_3: Stabilized voice calls for real use by switching to the new signaling and media path and bumping the client version and locale cache together.
changelog.v1149_1: Channel sender privacy was tightened so joined channel members now see "Someone" instead of the creator identity in message labels.
changelog.v1149_2: Server and client channel payloads now hide creator-identifying sender and owner fields from non-owner members.
changelog.v1149_3: Unread badges after reload now stop counting older incoming messages once you have already sent a newer message in that chat.
changelog.v1148_1: Added admin verification controls for users and chats, and verified badges now appear across the client with theme-synced coloring.
changelog.v1148_2: Introduced the official verified Noveo bot in every user's direct messages with localized welcome and login notices.
changelog.v1148_3: Bumped the visible app version, locale cache tag, and asset versions so the verification rollout loads immediately.
changelog.v1147_1: Expanded quick reactions to the full Telegram-style reaction set used by the updated picker.
changelog.v1147_2: Bumped the visible client version and added this release to the in-app changelog so settings now show the correct current build.
changelog.v1147_3: Updated changelog entries for every shipped language and refreshed the locale cache tag so the new version text loads immediately.
changelog.v1146_1: Saved stickers are now stored on your account through the server instead of staying only in the current browser.
changelog.v1146_2: If you had older locally saved stickers, the client now migrates them into your account after login so they sync across devices.
changelog.v1146_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so account-synced sticker saving loads immediately.
changelog.v1145_1: The top error notice now uses explicit keyframe animation so it visibly drops into place instead of appearing abruptly.
changelog.v1145_2: Dismissal animation now reliably plays upward before the notice hides, including on rapid repeated errors and click-to-dismiss.
changelog.v1145_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the corrected toast animation loads immediately.
changelog.v1144_1: Local sticker saving now supports TGS stickers too, alongside PNG and WEBP sticker files.
changelog.v1144_2: Holding a locally saved sticker in the picker now removes it from local storage, and the top error notice can be clicked to dismiss faster.
changelog.v1144_3: Adjusted the top notice animation so it drops into place on show and moves upward on dismiss, then bumped the locale cache and script version again.
changelog.v1143_1: Replaced the blocking centered error popup with a minimal top notice bar.
changelog.v1143_2: Error notices now slide in at the top, stay briefly, then animate upward and disappear automatically.
changelog.v1143_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so the lighter error notice UI loads immediately.
changelog.v1142_1: PNG and WEBP file messages now expose a client-side Save as Sticker action in the message menu.
changelog.v1142_2: Saved stickers are stored locally in the browser and merged into your existing sticker picker without changing server data.
changelog.v1142_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so the local sticker-saving feature loads immediately.
changelog.v1141_1: Stars amounts now use two-decimal precision, so giveaways can send 0.01 instead of being locked to 0.1 steps.
changelog.v1141_2: Channel settings now include an Edit Handle popup with a text field plus a Delete Handle action.
changelog.v1141_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so the Stars precision and handle editor load immediately.
changelog.v1140_1: Seen receipts now require the chat view to be actively visible instead of firing just because a chat is still selected in client state.
changelog.v1140_2: Incoming messages no longer get auto-seen when the app is unfocused, hidden, or the mobile chat view is not actually open.
changelog.v1140_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so the seen-receipt visibility fix loads immediately.
changelog.v1139_1: Defined the missing client-side password minimum constant so register and change-password validation no longer crash.
changelog.v1139_2: The frontend now enforces the same default 4-character minimum before sending auth requests.
changelog.v1139_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so the auth validation fix loads immediately.
changelog.v1138_1: Group handle previews now label the join bar correctly as Join Group instead of Join Channel.
changelog.v1138_2: After joining a group or channel from its handle preview, the chat now immediately reopens into the live message input state.
changelog.v1138_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so the join-label and immediate post-join refresh load right away.
changelog.v1137_1: Changed admin-panel user deletion to anonymize accounts into Deleted Account instead of hard-deleting the user row.
changelog.v1137_2: Deleted-admin users now lose all sent messages and all non-private memberships, so they no longer count in groups or channels while existing DMs keep a ghost Deleted Account fallback.
changelog.v1137_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so the deleted-account ghost fallback and realtime cleanup load immediately.
changelog.v1136_1: Fixed handle previews for joinable groups so opening a group by handle shows the join bar instead of a dead message input.
changelog.v1136_2: Replaced the browser leave-group confirmation with the app's own confirmation modal path.
changelog.v1136_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so the group-handle join and leave-confirm UI fixes load immediately.
changelog.v1135_1: Expanded message reactions again with folded hands, poop, strawberry, and banana emojis.
changelog.v1135_2: Updated both the server reaction whitelist and the client quick-reaction row so the new emojis work end to end.
changelog.v1135_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so the added reactions load immediately.
changelog.v1134_1: Reserved the public lobby handle as @lobby on the server and made handle lookup accept that lobby chat too.
changelog.v1134_2: Expanded message reactions with additional emojis including pleading face and clown on both the server and quick-reaction picker.
changelog.v1134_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so the lobby handle and new reactions load immediately.
changelog.v1133_1: Fixed the avatar editor dialog sizing so it uses a real bounded height instead of growing past the viewport.
changelog.v1133_2: The editor body now owns the scroll area and the footer actions stay reachable at the bottom on zoomed screens.
changelog.v1133_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the avatar editor layout fix loads immediately.
changelog.v1132_1: Moved avatar rotation behavior onto the crop square itself so rotating no longer drives the whole image transform path.
changelog.v1132_2: Export now respects the rotated crop square while the preview keeps the image and the crop overlay decoupled.
changelog.v1132_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so the crop-square rotation fix loads immediately.
changelog.v1131_1: Made the avatar editor modal scrollable so the footer actions stay reachable on zoomed or shorter screens.
changelog.v1131_2: Replaced the old rotate buttons with icon-based controls and moved rotation to a draggable touch handle attached to the crop square.
changelog.v1131_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so the avatar editor layout and touch-rotate update loads immediately.
changelog.v1130_1: Fixed the profile photo crop-box resize logic so changing the square size no longer automatically zooms the image.
changelog.v1130_2: The editor now keeps image scale stable during crop resizing and only raises zoom if it is actually needed to keep the crop area covered.
changelog.v1130_3: Bumped the locale cache and script version again so the avatar editor crop fix loads immediately.
changelog.v1129_1: Reworked the profile photo editor to use a Telegram-style movable and resizable square crop box instead of a fixed crop frame.
changelog.v1129_2: Avatar export now compresses the edited image before upload and keeps an in-editor upload progress bar visible while the upload runs.
changelog.v1129_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the upgraded avatar editor loads immediately.
changelog.v1128_1: Added a profile photo editor before avatar upload with crop, drag, zoom, and 90-degree rotate controls.
changelog.v1128_2: Saving a new avatar now exports the edited square image first, then sends that processed result through the existing upload path.
changelog.v1128_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the new avatar editor loads immediately.
changelog.v1127_1: Added emoji reactions to messages with quick reaction circles at the top of the message action menu.
changelog.v1127_2: Selecting a reaction now toggles it on the message and syncs the updated counts live across the chat.
changelog.v1127_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the new reaction UI loads immediately.
changelog.v1126_1: Fresh chat opens now reset the stored pagination cursor for that chat before loading messages again.
changelog.v1126_2: Reopening a chat after loading older history now returns to the latest messages instead of reusing stale older-page state.
changelog.v1126_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the reopen-to-latest fix loads immediately.
changelog.v1125_1: Opening a chat now clears any stale saved scroll anchor for that chat before the initial message load begins.
changelog.v1125_2: Fresh chat opens land on the latest message again instead of restoring an old intermediate position.
changelog.v1125_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the chat-open latest-message fix loads immediately.
changelog.v1124_1: Fixed gift giveaway cards inside chat messages so they no longer stay capped to a narrow fixed inner width.
changelog.v1124_2: Gift giveaway content now fills the message bubble width normally instead of leaving a broken empty area beside the card.
changelog.v1124_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the gift layout fix loads immediately.
changelog.v1123_1: Fixed the contact-list crash path by removing the failing ban-state helper dependency from sidebar chat item rendering.
changelog.v1123_2: Chat history can render the contact list again without throwing a ReferenceError during startup.
changelog.v1123_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the startup crash fix loads immediately.
changelog.v1122_1: Removed the unstable offscreen message rendering optimization that was changing effective chat height while scrolling.
changelog.v1122_2: This restores a stable scrollbar track so dragging through long chats no longer stretches, snaps back, or locks to a bad position.
changelog.v1122_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the scrollbar stability fix loads immediately.
changelog.v1121_1: Active chat scrolling now temporarily disables the offscreen message optimization so dragging the scrollbar no longer shakes against changing intrinsic heights.
changelog.v1121_2: Reply jumps now compare the target against the currently rendered message range and keep loading older pages until that referenced message is actually mounted.
changelog.v1121_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the scrollbar-drag and reply-jump fixes load immediately.
changelog.v1120_1: Reply and pinned-message jumps now load older message pages automatically when the target message is not yet rendered in the current DOM.
changelog.v1120_2: Clicking a reply now scrolls to the real referenced message instead of failing whenever that message was only present in chat state but not yet mounted.
changelog.v1120_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the reply-jump fix loads immediately.
changelog.v1119_1: Offscreen chat messages now rely on browser containment and content-visibility so they stay out of full rendering work while still preserving correct layout and scrollbar height.
changelog.v1119_2: Programmatic bottom-scrolls no longer overwrite the user's saved manual scroll state, and new incoming messages auto-follow only while the user is still at the bottom.
changelog.v1119_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the message virtualization and auto-follow fixes load immediately.
changelog.v1118_1: Initial chat opening now waits an extra render pass before applying the final scroll target, so the jump happens after the message list is actually loaded.
changelog.v1118_2: Sending a message now force-scrolls the current chat to the bottom and clears any saved manual scroll position for that chat.
changelog.v1118_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the chat-open and send-scroll fixes load immediately.
changelog.v1117_1: Fixed initial chat opening so the message list no longer measures against placeholder wrapper heights before the real layout settles.
changelog.v1117_2: Fresh chat loads now apply their final scroll target only after the initial render and media pass, which keeps the view anchored to the latest message.
changelog.v1117_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the chat-open scroll fix loads immediately.
changelog.v1116_1: Video attachments in chat messages no longer use the small square media box reserved for static images.
changelog.v1116_2: Videos now render in a larger responsive frame while images and other static media keep the compact preview size.
changelog.v1116_3: Bumped the locale cache and asset versions again so the updated media sizing loads immediately.
changelog.v1114_1: Restored the missing shared modal theme helper that report and recheck modals were calling.
changelog.v1114_2: This fixes the runtime crash where opening the report flow threw a ReferenceError before the modal could finish rendering.
changelog.v1114_3: Bumped the locale cache again so the fixed build replaces older cached script versions immediately.
changelog.v1115_1: Fixed more gift-flow strings that JS was still overwriting in English after the localized HTML had already rendered.
changelog.v1115_2: Added the missing locale key for the forward-message modal title and localized the remaining gift status and fallback text.
changelog.v1115_3: Bumped the locale cache tag again so the new forward and gift labels load immediately.
changelog.v1113_1: Fixed the message report request payload to always send string IDs that match the server's expected format.
changelog.v1113_2: Localized the report modal and report result/error messages instead of leaving them hardcoded in English.
changelog.v1113_3: Bumped the locale cache tag again so the report-flow fixes load immediately.
changelog.v1112_1: Localized the message context menu and inline action button labels that were still hardcoded in JS.
changelog.v1112_2: Reply, Copy, Forward, Report, Delete, Edit, and Pin Message now resolve from locale files.
changelog.v1112_3: Bumped the locale cache tag again so the right-click menu translations load immediately.
changelog.v1111_1: Moved the selected-chat sidebar count off a hardcoded string and onto locale keys.
changelog.v1111_2: The selection title now translates properly instead of showing mixed output like "1 selected" in non-English languages.
changelog.v1111_3: Bumped the locale cache again so the new selection label loads immediately.
changelog.v1110_1: Filled in missing Russian branding locale values that were still left in English.
changelog.v1110_2: Russian app header, messenger name, and Stars branding labels now resolve to localized strings.
changelog.v1110_3: Updated the localized changelog again for this locale-file completion pass.
changelog.v1109_1: Fixed more hardcoded dialogs and prompts, including DM delete scope, E2EE unavailable, leave-chat, bulk delete, and gift card action text.
changelog.v1109_2: Persian mixed count strings now use bidi isolation so labels like members and online counts keep the correct order in the LTR layout.
changelog.v1109_3: Number-input placeholders keep ASCII digits while visible Persian UI counts and gift/wallet labels remain localized.
changelog.v1108_1: Persian now converts app-owned digits to Persian numerals across translated strings, timestamps, counters, balances, and similar UI text.
changelog.v1108_2: Version labels, changelog headers, bio counters, gift stock counts, and Stars amounts now respect Persian digit rendering too.
changelog.v1108_3: Updated the localized changelog again so this release note also appears in the selected app language.
changelog.v1104_1: Localized more remaining runtime text such as seen-by labels, joined dates, timestamps, sender prefixes, and device session labels.
changelog.v1104_2: Localized chat settings titles, E2EE status/system text, and several profile/contact action labels that were still hardcoded.
changelog.v1104_3: Moved changelog entries onto locale keys so the changelog section translates with the selected language.
changelog.v1102_1: Localized more runtime status text including last seen, member counts, wallet counters, and giveaway labels.
changelog.v1102_2: Language refresh now updates more dynamic views instead of leaving active chat and profile text in English.
changelog.v1102_3: Fixed Stars and gift giveaway cards to size correctly on narrow phone screens.
changelog.v1101_1: Expanded language coverage across modals, wallet, gift flows, forward UI, chat settings, and common runtime messages.
changelog.v1101_2: Additional interface labels now resolve from locale JSON files instead of staying hardcoded in English.
changelog.v1101_3: Locale-driven placeholders, button labels, and error titles now cover much more of the main app shell.
changelog.v1105_1: Rewrote locale JSON files as ASCII-safe Unicode escapes to prevent question-mark corruption on some server/encoding paths.
changelog.v1105_2: Fixed broken translated strings that were rendering as ????? in non-English languages.
changelog.v1105_3: Bumped the locale cache tag so browsers fetch the corrected translation files immediately.
changelog.v1106_1: Changed runtime date and time formatting to explicit per-language locales instead of browser-default formatting.
changelog.v1106_2: Fixed mixed-language timestamps such as Persian text rendering beside English AM/PM markers.
changelog.v1106_3: Kept Gregorian formatting for Persian while avoiding the broken ordering shown in status and joined-time labels.
changelog.v1107_1: Localized more remaining contacts and Stars/wallet text, including search, empty states, wallet updates, and gift detail labels.
changelog.v1107_2: Replaced hardcoded Noveo and Noveo Messenger header branding with locale-driven app-name keys.
changelog.v1107_3: Improved the E2EE wording to explain it as a secure end-to-end encrypted chat instead of only using terse technical labels.

settings.blockGroupInvitesDesc: Prevent others from adding you to groups
settings.emojiStyleDesc: Choose how emojis are rendered in chats.
settings.notificationsBlocked: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings.
settings.notificationsUnavailable: Notifications are not available in this browser.

emailBot.title: Email
emailBot.localPartRules: Use lowercase letters, numbers, dot, underscore, or hyphen.
emailBot.localPartRequired: Enter the email name you want.
emailBot.createFailed: Could not create that email address.
emailBot.composeSubtitle: Write and send an email through @email.
emailBot.subject: Title
emailBot.composeRequired: Enter a target email address and a body.

onboarding.slide1: Private chats that stay fast, clean, and easy to follow.
onboarding.slide2: Built-in email service through Mail, without leaving Noveo.
onboarding.slide3: Groups, channels, and polls that keep communities organized.
onboarding.slide4: Voice, media, and messaging in one place from the start.

bot.title: Bots
bot.startPromptSub: Press Start to send /start and activate the bot conversation.
bot.callbackFailed: Could not send that bot action.
